competitions.name: ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Active farming, growing or forestry business based in England; single applicants only.
competitions.local_gate: England farming/growing/forestry applicant and registered Project Facilitator evidence required.

competitions.name: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK and Swiss collaborations only; UK business lead must collaborate with a Swiss implementation partner and at least one research institute.
competitions.local_gate: SWISS_PARTNER_RESEARCH_INSTITUTE_BUDGET_AND_FINANCE_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED

competitions.name: Scaling performance of quantum computing hardware: CR&D
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; lead must be a UK registered business or RTO.
competitions.local_gate: Quantum hardware lead, hardware access, consortium, budget and Project Impact evidence required.

competitions.name: DRIVE35 Innovation Fund: Collaborate 3
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead.
competitions.local_gate: Vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 partner, SME claimant, match funding, late-stage R&D and budget evidence required.

competitions.name: Next Wave: Breakthrough Wave 1
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single UK SME or UK SME lead for collaboration.
competitions.local_gate: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

competitions.name: CfI: Earlier identification of UK children with SEN
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single legal entity contract route; organisations of any size can lead.
competitions.local_gate: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

competitions.name: Future Leaders Fellowships: Round 11, business and non-academic
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single applicants with supporting organisations; UK registered business may host.
competitions.local_gate: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

competitions.name: DRIVE35: Scale Up Fund
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK registered business can lead; project must create scale-up manufacturing facilities for zero emission vehicle technologies.
competitions.local_gate: ZEV manufacturing facility, co-investment, eligible business lead, site and cost evidence required.

competitions.name: Consumer Led Flexibility for the Clean Energy Superpower Mission
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single applicants or collaborations; UK business, RTO, charity, not-for-profit, public sector organisation or academic institution can lead.
competitions.local_gate: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

competitions.name: Innovation Loans Expression of Interest
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Loan route for single UK registered SMEs only; not grant funding.
competitions.local_gate: INNOVATION_LOANS_REPAYABLE_FINANCE_CAPACITY_AND_ACTION_APPROVAL_REQUIRED

competitions.name: Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; lead must be an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England.
competitions.local_gate: England farming lead, UK farming collaborator, listed facilitator, site and budget evidence required.

competitions.name: ACTASAP Pilot Phase 1
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK registered academic institutions must work alone or lead.
competitions.local_gate: Academic lead, TTO or equivalent support, ACT idea ownership and eligible cost basis required.

competitions.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Lead must be UK higher education/further education institution, RTO or Catapult and collaborate with a UK business with four or more FTE.
competitions.local_gate: Knowledge Base lead, four-or-more-FTE business evidence, finance contribution and AKT Monitoring Officer invite evidence required.

competitions.name: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) Autumn
competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single applicant route for UK registered government research organisations including PRSE, UKRI wholly owned institute, or eligible public sector body with research as a primary function.
competitions.local_gate: Eligible public sector research organisation, Knowledge Asset ownership and senior support evidence required.
